channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Curb stone is loose., 4th May
item.description:
Curb stone is loose and when driven or walked over rocks and sticks up. Being made worse as the road is used for pre and post school traffic due to the proximity to Grangefield School.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 5, The Holt, Bishop's Cleeve, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Potential flytipping on Hewlett Road, 4th May
item.description:
It might be booked in for kerbside collection from reclaim, but just in case it is fly tipping , there is mirrored chest of drawers outside Sidney Lodge on Hewlett Road.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 22, Hewlett Road, Fairview, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Two trees felled on Village Road GL510AE, 4th May
item.description:
Hi, Two trees have been felled on Village Road GL510AE by the council/highway maintenance. Are there any plans to replace the two trees. There is a problem with water logging at that exact place.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 8, Village Road, Kingsditch, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Resident replaced curb grass with astroturf, 4th May
item.description:
Astro turf has been placed, covering the grass verge, probably to extend the resident's driveway.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 30, Orchard Way, Kingsditch, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped tyres, 3rd May
item.description:
Tyres dumped by the side of the road.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Oxenton, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped furniture, 3rd May
item.description:
Furniture dumped on the side of the road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Oxenton, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Footpath ploughed out, 3rd May
item.description:
I was unable to walk on this route. Not signposted. Field ploughed and unable to walk on it
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): M5, Badgeworth, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The footpath is blocked and not marked, 3rd May
item.description:
I attempted to walk this route today. The indicated route is blocked with fencing and barbed wire. No sign posts and no indication of how to follow this route.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): M5, Churchdown, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Loose sign, 3rd May
item.description:
Sign is hanging off lamp post

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Athelney Way, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Sign bracket is hanging/fallen off (Non illuminating sign)

item.title: Another pot hole, 3rd May
item.description:
Very degraded road surface
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Gretton Road, Prescott, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dangerous lack of visibility again, 3rd May
item.description:
The vegitation neans there is a lack of visibikity of oncomming cars and pedestrians at this dangerous and ill thiught out traffic calming. This needs to be cut every month, or there will be a major accident.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Gotherington Lane, Bishop's Cleeve
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Wobbly slab in Prices Road, 3rd May
item.description:
Very unstable and uneven paving stone (the one with 5 sides in the photos)

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 5, Princes Road, Warden Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blocked drain you can see discarded tin cans in there, 3rd May
item.description:
Opposition Brook House on Moorend Road Charlton Pard WARD

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 11, Moorend Road, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overflowing Bin, 3rd May
item.description:
On the grass area next to Hardwick

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Saint Paul's Road, Wymans Brook, Cheltenham

item.title: Flytipped items, 3rd May
item.description:
Large metal fencing and wooden panels at the corner of Midwinter Avenue

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 30, Midwinter Avenue, Wymans Brook, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipped broken cupboard etc., 3rd May
item.description:
Flytipped rubbish between the FOOTPATH and the road - not actually visible from the road so you need to take three steps to the footpath to see this.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kayte Lane, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 110cmx30cm pothole in Albert Road at GL52 2TN, 3rd May
item.description:
A significant layer of tarmac is missing near the middle of Albert Road just by the drive to Albert Court. This drive is used by 9 vehicles to exit onto Albert Road. The pothole is a potential hazard, especially when vehicles are parked on the east side of Albert Road. This pothole has recently appeared (although there are many other older potholes all along Albert Road).

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 30, Albert Road, Marle Hill, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipped item, 3rd May
item.description:
Computer chair at the corner of Manser and Hanover Street

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 50, Hanover Street, Marle Hill, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipped wood sheets opposite ‘Production av’, 3rd May
item.description:
New flytipping of wooden sheets and fast food wrappings and cartons.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): The Runnings, Kingsditch, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Speed bumps, 3rd May
item.description:
Pot holes on sides of speed bump
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 155, Arle Road, Kingsditch, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
